content.en: Who’s a good dog?! Dogs are great! When we come home, they show us love and happiness! They make us laugh. They make us walk! We play with them.
content.tw: 誰是乖狗狗？！狗狗真棒！回到家的時候，狗狗會用愛與快樂讓我們開懷大笑！我們和狗狗出門散步、玩遊戲，度過快樂的時光。

content.en: Dogs want to be with others. They want to do everything together. That is why they look so happy to see us!
content.tw: 狗是群居動物，喜歡跟別人待在一起，也喜歡一起做各種事情。所以每次看到我們回家的時候，牠們總是特別興奮！

content.en: When we go out, we worry. Our dogs do not want to be alone. But we cannot be with them all the time…
content.tw: 不過，當我們出門的時候，也會擔心家裡的狗狗。牠們不喜歡孤單，但我們又不可能隨時陪在牠們的身邊……

content.en: What can we do?! We can go online and find... TV for dogs! TV for dogs are videos made for dogs.
content.tw: 那該怎麼辦呢？其實，我們可以上網找「狗狗電視」！這是專門為狗狗設計的影片。

content.en: Our dogs can watch other dogs, other animals, fun toys, and much more! They can watch them in blue and yellow. Those are the colors dogs see best.
content.tw: 牠們可以看其他的狗、各種動物、有趣的玩具等等。影片中的畫面也會以藍色跟黃色為主，因為這是狗狗最容易看清楚的顏色。

content.en: Thunder, fireworks, and other loud sounds can scare our dogs. TV for dogs does not scare dogs with sounds. Our dogs can listen to calm music and nice sounds.
content.tw: 打雷、放煙火或其他巨大聲響，常常會讓狗狗感到害怕。但狗狗電視不會播放會嚇到牠們的聲音。相反地，裡面有舒緩的音樂跟輕鬆的自然聲響。

content.en: Now we do not have to worry. We can go to school or work. Our dogs will not feel alone!
content.tw: 現在我們不用擔心了。我們可以去上學或工作。我們的狗狗將不會感到孤獨！

vocabulary.preface: 狗是群居動物，不喜歡孤獨。現在有新的辦法陪伴狗狗。

content.text:
1. music 音樂。
Hey, are those your headphones Buddy is wearing? 巴弟戴著你的耳機嗎?
Yeah, Buddy likes soft music. 是的，巴弟喜歡輕柔的音樂。
Dogs like music? That’s news to me. 狗狗喜歡音樂?這可是新聞。

2. sound 聲音。
They really do. 牠們真的喜歡。
They’re scared of loud and noisy sounds. 牠們害怕吵鬧的聲音。
But why the headphones? 但是為什麼戴耳機?
Oh, I don’t want music when I’m watching TV. 我看電視的時候不要有音樂。

3. listen 注意聽。
So you watch TV and Buddy listens to music. 所以你看電視，巴弟聽音樂。

4. all the time 整天。
I can’t be with Buddy all the time. 我不能整天跟牠在一起。
Music makes him feel less alone. 音樂讓牠比較不孤單。

vocabulary.postscript:
你記得今天的單字嗎?
music音樂 sound聲音 listen注意聽 all the time整天

quiz.question: 1. Where can we find TV for dogs?
2. What kind of sounds does TV for dogs have?
3. What colors can dogs see best?

title: A Long, Crazy Drive to South Africa

content.en: Do you like to go for long drives? How long is your longest drive? Two men wanted to go for a very long drive. They wanted to start in the U.K. They wanted to drive to South Africa! How crazy!
content.tw: 你喜歡開車長途旅行嗎？有兩名男子有個瘋狂的想法。他們想從英國出發，一路開車到南非！

content.en: The men got a small car. It has three wheels. One is in the front. Two are in the back. The car is 25 years old!
content.tw: 他們找來一輛三輪小汽車。這輛老車有已經有二十五年車齡了！

content.en: This old car is not strong. But the men drove it in wet jungles. They drove it in hot, dry deserts. They drove it up and down mountains! That is crazy!
content.tw: 這兩人開著老車穿越潮濕的叢林與乾燥的沙漠。老車翻山越嶺，太不可思議了！

content.en: The car broke down many times. But people in Africa fixed it every time! How lucky!
content.tw: 這台車在路上故障了很多次。但幸運的是，總會有人能幫他們修好！

content.en: The men drove and drove. They drove in 22 countries! They saw elephants! Giraffes ran next to their car!
content.tw: 這兩名男子開車穿越了二十二個國家！他們還看見了大象跟長頸鹿在車旁奔跑！

content.en: Sometimes there was danger. A bus almost hit them. And in some countries, there were wars. Whoa, how scary…
content.tw: 在這趟旅程中，他們差一點與巴士擦撞，還經過深陷戰亂的國家，十分危險。

content.en: The men drove 22,000 kilometers! That is the longest drive for a car with three wheels.
content.tw: 他們總共行駛了二萬二千公里，創下了三輪汽車最長行駛距離的新紀錄！

content.en: What a crazy drive! Where will these two men drive next?
content.tw: 這是一段多麼瘋狂的旅程！這兩位男子接下來會開往哪裡呢？

vocabulary.preface: 這兩名男士開著三個輪子的汽車，花了一百多天穿越非洲。

content.text:
1. longest 最長的。
How long was your longest ride in a car? 你坐過最長的一趟車程有多長?
Hmmm, about 700 kilometers from Ulaanbaatar to Gobi. 大約七百公里，從烏蘭巴托到戈壁。

2. country 國家。
In Mongolia? 在蒙古?
Yeah. It’s a big country. 對，它是個很大的國家。

3. desert 沙漠。
Did you see deserts and sand dunes? 有看到沙漠跟沙丘嗎?
Oh yes. The scenery was amazing! 有，很精采的風景!

4. break down 拋錨。
Lucky you! 你很幸運! I was once stuck on a bus in Canada. 我有一次被卡在加拿大的巴士上。
Oh no. 真糟糕。
It broke down after 5 hours. 它開了五個小時，然後拋錨了。

vocabulary.postscript:
你喜歡坐車嗎? 來讀單字。
longest最長的 country國家 desert沙漠 break down拋錨

quiz.question: 1. Where did the men start the drive?
2. How many wheels does the men's car have?
3. What animals ran next to their car?

title: A Little Dark Chocolate Might Be Good for You

content.en: Did you know our bodies can be younger or older than we are? Maybe you are ten, but your body is twelve!
content.tw: 你可知道，我們身體的年齡可能會比實際年齡年輕或者年老呢?

content.en: Our bodies' age shows how worn out our cells are. How do scientists know they are wearing out?
content.tw: 身體年齡從細胞衰退的程度可以看出來。那麼科學家怎麼知道細胞正在衰退呢？

content.en: Each cell has chromosomes. A chromosome looks like an "X." It has four ends. There is a cap on each end. The four caps keep the chromosome safe.
content.tw: 每個細胞裡都有染色體。染色體看起來像個英文字母「X」，一共有四個末端。每個末端都有一個用來保護染色體的小帽子。

content.en: But as a cell gets worn out, the caps get shorter. That is how scientists know.
content.tw: 隨著細胞衰退或是變弱，保護帽會越變越短。科學家用這個來做判斷。

content.en: But what can stop the caps from getting shorter? Can dark chocolate help? Some scientists are studying it!
content.tw: 現在，有些科學家正在研究，怎麼樣讓保護帽變短的過程慢下來。

content.en: The scientists found that people who eat dark chocolate have longer caps than people who do not eat it. The longer caps mean their chromosomes look younger!
content.tw: 研究發現，常吃黑巧克力的人，保護帽比不吃的人長！保護帽越長，代表染色體越年輕！

content.en: But wait! We cannot eat all the dark chocolate we want! It has sugar and fat too. So scientists say a little dark chocolate with lots of cocoa is okay.
content.tw: 但是不能開懷大吃黑巧克力喔！它含有糖跟脂肪，所以科學家建議我們吃一點就好。

content.en: Scientists are learning more. But for now, a little dark chocolate might be good for your body! Yum!
content.tw: 科學家正在了解更多。但目前來說，吃一點黑巧克力可能對你的身體有益！真好吃！

vocabulary.preface: 科學家正在研究，如何讓人體老化的速度變慢。

content.text:
1. younger 比較年輕。
Look at this photo of me when I was younger. 你看我比較年輕時的照片。Wow, you look so different! 哇，你看起來很不一樣!

2. longer 比較長。
How so? 怎麼說?
Your hair was longer, 頭髮比較長，and you looked like a teenager! 而且看起來才十幾歲!
Come on, I wasn’t that young! 好啦，沒那麼年輕!

3. wear out 變弱，或是衰退。
Hey, you don’t look old now. 你現在看起來也並不老!
But I feel worn out all the time. 但是我經常覺得好累。
You just need a vacation. 你只是需要去度假。

4. body 身體。
Definitely! It’ll be good for my body and soul. 一定要的! 對我的身體和靈魂都有好處!

vocabulary.postscript: 今天你學到哪些單字? younger比較年輕 longer比較長 wear out變弱，衰退 body身體

quiz.question: 1. How many caps does one chromosome have?
2. What happens when a cell gets worn out?

title: Rice Seeds Feel the Sound of Rain

content.en: What makes seeds grow into plants?
content.tw: 是什麼讓種子長成一棵一棵植物？

content.en: We put seeds in water or the ground. We do this when the weather is good for them. We water seeds in the ground. Then we wait. The seeds start to grow.
content.tw: 天氣好的時候播種，把種子放進土裡或水中，並且替土裡的種子澆水。然後就等它發芽。

content.en: Two scientists thought sounds might make seeds grow too. Then, they found the sound of raindrops makes rice seeds grow!
content.tw: 有兩位科學家發現，雨滴落下的聲音似乎能讓稻米種子生長變快！

content.en: But, how does the sound of raindrops do this? Seeds do not have ears!
content.tw: 但這是怎麼回事？種子又沒有耳朵！

content.en: A raindrop can shake the water and the ground. The seeds feel the shaking. It moves very small parts in the seeds. The seeds start to grow. And, they grow faster than seeds that did not feel any shaking from raindrops!
content.tw: 原來雨滴落到地面上會產生震動，種子感覺到這種震動就開始發芽，而且比沒有感受到震動的種子長得快！

content.en: How much faster do the seeds grow? Scientists tried raindrops for light, medium, and heavy rain. With raindrops for medium and heavy rain, the seeds grow 30 to 40 percent faster.
content.tw: 科學家模擬了小雨、中雨跟大雨三種情況。他們發現，在中雨跟大雨的震動下，種子的生長速度可以提高百分之三十到四十！

content.en: Scientists want to study other natural sounds. Maybe seeds can feel the sound of the wind!
content.tw: 現在，科學家還想研究其他的大自然的聲音。也許種子也能感受到風的聲音喔！

content.en: Can you think of other natural sounds? Maybe you will find one that makes seeds grow faster too!
content.tw: 你能想到其他大自然的聲音嗎？也許你也會發現一個能讓種子長得更快的聲音！

vocabulary.preface: 種子可以感覺到土地的震動，而調整它的發芽生長。

content.text:
1. sound 聲音。
Is that the sound of raindrops? 那是下雨的聲音嗎?
Yeah, it’s raining… again! 對，又下雨了!
But we had sunshine this morning! 但是早上還有太陽的!

2. plant 植物。
Think of it this way. 你可以這麼想。 It’s good for the plants. 下雨對植物好。 But not good for me! 但是對我不好。

3. faster 快一點。
Well, you want your tomatoes to grow faster, don’t you? 你不是想要你的番茄長快一點?
Yeah, true. I can’t wait to use them for my pasta. 真的，我等不及做義大利麵要用了。

4. weather 天氣。
Then you should love this weather. 那你應該喜歡這天氣。
Yeah, for my dinner. 好吧，為了我的晚餐。

vocabulary.postscript: 你有種過什麼植物嗎?來讀單字。sound聲音 plant植物 faster快一點 weather天氣

quiz.question: 1. What seeds did the scientists study?
2. What made the seeds grow faster?
3. How much faster did the seeds grow?

title: Taiwan has World’s Best Latte Art Maker

content.en: Some people can make pretty pictures... in coffee! They make them with very, very small milk bubbles. The pictures are called latte art.
content.tw: 有些人可以在咖啡的表面，用很小的牛奶泡泡畫出各種圖案，這叫做咖啡拉花。

content.en: A man from Taiwan started making latte art 12 years ago. He started competing in latte art contests eight years ago.
content.tw: 一名臺灣男子學習咖啡拉花已經十二年。八年前，他開始參加比賽。

content.en: This year, he wanted to compete in a big contest in the U.S. Before the contest, he trained for four months. Every day, he made 100 drinks with latte art! About 100 people helped him with money, training, and many other things!
content.tw: 今年，他想參加在美國舉行的大型比賽。為了這場比賽他訓練了四個月，每天做一百次拉花！一百多人提供資金，支持他訓練。

content.en: The man went to the contest. Thirty-three people from around the world competed. They made a lot of latte art very fast!
content.tw: 然後他前往美國，跟來自世界各地的選手較量，他們必須在短時間做出許多拉花作品。

content.en: At the end, the man made six drinks in 10 minutes! He made pictures of a raccoon, a giraffe, and red pandas.
content.tw: 這名男子在十分鐘內完成了六杯咖啡拉花！他在飲料上畫出浣熊、長頸鹿跟小貓熊。

content.en: And, the man won the contest! Now Taiwan has the best maker of latte art in the world!
content.tw: 結果他贏了比賽！現在，臺灣擁有世界第一的咖啡拉花大師！

content.en: This man says you should do what you love to do. He says great things can happen when you do that!
content.tw: 他說只要全心投入自己熱愛的事，就有機會創造出偉大的成就！

content.en: What do you love to do?
content.tw: 你熱愛做什麼呢？

vocabulary.preface: 咖啡拉花也有世界冠軍，今年是由台灣選手獲得!

content.text:
1. art 藝術。
Wow, my coffee has a rose on it! 哇，我的咖啡上面有一朵玫瑰。
Mine has a cat! 我的有一隻貓!
Our coffee lady makes perfect latte art! 我們的咖啡女士會做完美的拉花。

2. do 做。
I’ve tried to do this at home. 我在家裡試著做。 It’s hard! 好難喔!
I know. It takes time to learn the trick. 我知道，要花不少時間才能學到訣竅。

3. pretty 美麗的。
It’s worth it. 很值得。Just look at the pretty picture! 看看這個漂亮的圖案!

4. contest 比賽。
Did you know that she joined latte art contests? 你知道她參加過拉花比賽嗎? Our coffee lady? 我們的咖啡女士? Did she win? 她有沒有贏?
Yep, more than once. 贏了，還不止一次。

vocabulary.postscript: 你想學學看這項手藝嗎? art藝術 do做 pretty美麗的 contest比賽

quiz.question: 2. How did the man train every day?
options: a. He made 100 drinks with latte art.
c. He drank six drinks in ten minutes.

quiz.question: 3. What animal did the man make with latte art?
